items.name: theme
items.title: SIAB Theme
items.description: SIAB design tokens — colors, fonts, radius, shadows. Light + dark.

theme.font-serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

items.name: base
items.title: SIAB Base
items.description: Project bootstrap — Tailwind v4 base layer, tw-animate-css, lucide icons, SIAB theme tokens. Consumed by `shadcn init --preset` for new projects.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn() helper
items.description: The standard `cn()` utility — `clsx` + `tailwind-merge`. Used by every component.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Vertically stacked set of interactive headings.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog interrupting the user with important content.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: SIAB avatar — adds size variants and AvatarBadge / AvatarGroup / AvatarGroupCount subcomponents.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: SIAB button — extends shadcn with `xs`, `touch`, `icon-xs`, `icon-sm`, `icon-lg` size variants and global cursor-pointer.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Container with header / content / footer slots.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: React Hook Form + Zod integration via Radix Slot/Label.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: SIAB input — selection-color and dark-mode polish on shadcn baseline.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Composable app sidebar with mobile sheet, keyboard shortcut, cookie persistence.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Empty-rows render for tables, lists, and content areas.

items.name: confirm-dialog
items.title: Confirm Dialog
items.description: Plain confirmation dialog for low-stakes destructive actions.

items.name: typed-confirm-dialog
items.title: Typed Confirm Dialog
items.description: High-stakes confirmation requiring user to type the entity name.

items.name: sticky-form-footer
items.title: Sticky Form Footer
items.description: Mobile-aware sticky footer for primary form actions.

items.name: onboarding-checklist
items.title: Onboarding Checklist
items.description: Multi-step onboarding card list with per-step checkboxes, persisted to localStorage by configurable key. Each step gets title + ReactNode description + optional copy-to-clipboard button. Caller passes the steps array and storageKey — generic enough for any onboarding flow (DNS/proxy setup, tenant provisioning, post-install walkthroughs). Seed entries are non-overridable (true by virtue of upstream state, e.g. a tenant record already existing).

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Generic TanStack-Table-backed data table with mobile card view, filter, pagination. Requires Next.js (uses next/link).

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: Per-page header with title, optional subtitle, action slot, and beforeTitle slot for context affordances.

items.name: login-04
items.title: Login 04 (split with media)
items.description: Two-column auth shell: form on left, media (logo / image / branding) on right. Stacks on phone. Content-agnostic — pass your auth form as children and any media node.

items.name: mode-ui
items.title: SIAB Mode UI
items.description: Editor mode-switching UI — generic segmented-pill primitive, Canvas/Sidebar toggle bound to EditorMode, and a bottom-centre floating bar with admin-sidebar-aware positioning. Bundles the FLOATING_PILL_CLASS constant for shared floating-bar visual treatment.

items.name: mobile-floating-pill
items.title: SIAB Mobile Floating Pill
items.description: 48px circular floating action button for mobile editor surfaces. Variants: default | warning | destructive | loading | success. Position: top/bottom + left/right with safe-area insets. Optional badge counter. Used as the base primitive for save / back / section-action FABs.

items.name: save-ui
items.title: SIAB Save UI
items.description: Save lifecycle UI — desktop floating status pill (SaveStatusBar) with success/saving/error states + mobile save FAB (MobileSavePill) wrapping the shared MobileFloatingPill primitive. Owns the SaveStatus type co-located with SaveStatusBar.

items.name: use-rt-canvas-anchor
items.title: SIAB useAnchorRtCanvas hook
items.description: Resolves the nearest .rt-canvas ancestor for a given DOM ref. Used by anything that needs to anchor a popover or apply CSS variables to the canvas surface (palette picker, color chip). 27 LOC, no runtime deps.

items.name: theme-bar
items.title: SIAB Theme Bar
items.description: Floating glass-pill theme control bar with 3 segments (Colours / Fonts / Shape) and their picker panels. PalettePicker shows a row of palette presets with light/dark halves + a custom popover; FontPicker shows N font presets as a vertical preview list; RadiusControl is a 3-state toggle (sharp / soft / round). Preset catalogs are passed as props so per-site overrides can flow through future manifest changes without breaking the registry contract.

items.name: rich-text-toolbar
items.title: SIAB Rich Text Toolbar
items.description: Lexical-coupled rich-text editing chrome: persistent + floating toolbars composing 4 chips (mark/color/style/link), 2 additional chips ready for future use (block/font), /-triggered command palette, themed pill + dialog, URL popover, plus useActiveTextStyle peer hook. Bound to Lexical commands; portable to any Lexical editor that provides an RtManifest + lexical Node subclasses (themed-node, styled-heading) at the host project's @/lib/richText/* paths. Ships the `.rt-content*`, `.rt-content-bare*`, `.rt-field`, and `.rt-placeholder` CSS that styles the admin form-mode rich-text editable + placeholder + content hierarchy (h2/h3/h4, lists, quotes, code, themed pills) — consumers automatically inherit visual hierarchy without authoring any of it.

items.name: sidebar-inspector
items.title: SIAB Sidebar Inspector
items.description: Drill-down inspector panel for the canvas sidebar mode: 3-state machine (block list ↔ block form ↔ page settings), per-block form rendering with field-kind dispatch (richtext/text/image/icon/cta/array), sortable expand-in-place array item cards, per-row Duplicate/Delete actions menu, and an add-block affordance that opens BlockTypePicker. Block-list uses dnd-kit drag/drop for reordering. Forms use react-hook-form via useFormContext — caller must provide the form provider. Hidden-contract host imports for LexicalField, InlineImage, IconPicker, blockBySlug, BLOCK_ELEMENTS, CanvasSelectionContext, useBlockPresets (BlockPresetsContext), RtManifest, ThemeTokens, inspectorFontStyle helpers — consumer provides via @/components/editor/*, @/blocks/registry, @/lib/richText/manifest, @/lib/theme/{schema,inspectorFonts} paths.

items.name: mobile-inspector
items.title: SIAB Mobile Inspector
items.description: Mobile-viewport editor surface for the SIAB canvas: top-level block-list section navigation (mobile-section-list with dnd-kit drag-reorder + block-type picker entry), section editor view (mobile-section-edit composing a CanvasBlockRenderer + MobileInspectorBar drawer), Vaul-based bottom-drawer inspector chain (mobile-inspector-bar → mobile-component-editor → MediaSheet / IconSheet / ArrayDrilldown), page-level settings + SEO forms. All forms use react-hook-form via useFormContext — caller must provide the form provider. Mobile-specific context provider (MobileEditorContext) stays at the host's @/components/editor/canvas/mobile/MobileEditorContext path. Block-array reordering uses dnd-kit sortable. Hidden-contract host imports for LexicalField, MediaGrid + MediaUploader, blockBySlug, BLOCK_ELEMENTS, elementPath utilities, useCanvasBlocks, useMobileEditor, RtManifest, ThemeTokens, inspectorFontStyle helpers. Cross-sub-phase temporary host imports: CanvasBlockRenderer + BlockTypePicker + IconPicker / resolveLucideIcon (all sub-phase 7 — will be forward-touched at that time).

items.name: icon-picker
items.title: SIAB Icon Picker
items.description: Lucide icon picker — Popover-triggered grid with search. Takes value (kebab-case name), onChange, optional trigger as props. Exports resolveLucideIcon(kebab) helper for resolving stored values to React components at render time. Pure UI, no backend coupling.

items.name: block-type-picker
items.title: SIAB Block Type Picker
items.description: Block-type picker dialog with expandable tiles for inserting from a saved block preset. Pure UI primitive: receives blockTypes + presets + onAdd/onReloadPresets/onDeletePreset/sanitizePresetData as props. No backend coupling — caller supplies data + side-effect callbacks. Sonner toast for delete-success notification stays inside (shadcn UI-only). Type definitions BlockTypeDef and BlockPresetDef exported for caller adapters.

items.name: canvas-block-renderer
items.title: SIAB Canvas Block Renderer
items.description: Block-type dispatcher for the canvas editor. Renders the appropriate block component based on the block's slug. Hidden-contract host imports for the 7 SIAB block renderers (Hero, FeatureList, CTA, RichText, ContactSection, FAQ, Testimonials) from @/components/editor/canvas/blocks/* — site content stays in the host project per the application's content schema. No backend coupling.

items.name: canvas-chrome
items.title: SIAB Canvas Chrome
items.description: Canvas editor chrome: desktop CanvasMode (dnd-kit reorder + zoom + selection-scroll) + mobile CanvasMobile (delegates to mobile-inspector screens) + block-gutter (per-block drag/actions) + canvas-gap-button (+-insert opening block-type-picker via useBlockPresets hook). Plus useFitZoom + useScrollToSelection as peer registry:lib hooks (both targeting components/ui/). Application-level coupling on react-hook-form (useCanvasBlocks for block-array mutations), React contexts (useCanvasSelection from CanvasSelectionContext host file), and theme tokens (ThemeTokens, toCssVars). NO backend coupling — block-presets backend integration flows through the consumer's BlockPresetsProvider via the useBlockPresets() hook. Ships the full `.rt-canvas*` CSS surface: token re-bindings inside @layer base (admin shadcn tokens → tenant tokens from ThemeBar's runtime overlay + tenant compiled CSS), default-dark fallback (unlayered so tenant CSS overrides), `--rt-affordance` accent, themed `::selection`, `.cms-block` active/hover rings, inline-edit affordances (`.rt-slot` / `.rt-click-edit` hover/focus rings + nested-edit suppression), inline-variant slot tightening, `[data-rt-selected]` sidebar-mode ring, `@keyframes rt-arrival-pulse` arrival animation + `prefers-reduced-motion` guard, and FE-39 mobile dashed hit-targets.

items.name: unsaved-changes-dialog
items.title: SIAB Unsaved Changes Dialog
items.description: Generic Dialog primitive for confirming navigation away from a form with unsaved changes. Title + description + Cancel/Discard buttons. Pure UI — caller provides open state + onConfirm/onCancel callbacks. Used by 5+ form surfaces across siab-payload.

items.name: mobile-back-pill
items.title: SIAB Mobile Back Pill
items.description: Mobile floating-pill X-icon back-navigation button. Wraps @siab/mobile-floating-pill with the X icon + onBack callback. Tiny 24-LOC composition used by canvas-mobile (mobile editor view's back-to-section-list affordance).

items.name: save-button
items.title: SIAB Save Button
items.description: The canonical CMS save button — an inverted-surface pill, an amber dirty-state border (destructive when validation errors are present), and a floating count badge. Single source of truth consumed by PublishControls, the navigation manager and the settings / entity-edit forms so every save affordance reads identically. Pure UI, no backend coupling.

items.name: page-form-chrome
items.title: SIAB Page Form Chrome
items.description: PageForm-specific chrome trio: PageMetaInline (RHF title + auto-slug input), PublishControls (RHF publish status + Save button with loading/dirty/error visual states), EditorErrorBoundary (React error boundary with Retry button). All three are PageForm-only consumers — bundled as an umbrella for cohesive install. PageMetaInline uses slugify helper from the host's @/lib/slugify (pure utility, no backend).
